summary:
HDL is primarily synthesized in the liver and gastrointestinal tract, where apolipoprotein AI is produced by hepatocytes and enterocytes. This initiates HDL formation as pre-belta particles after acquiring lipids via ABCA1-mediated transport. \boxed{A} 

Final Output Format Requirement:
Only include the summary text within double quotation marks below; do not add explanations or commentary beyond what’s specified.
""HDL is primarily synthesized in the liver and gastrointestinal tract, where apolipoprotein AI is produced by hepatocytes and enterocytes, initiating HDL formation through lipid acquisition mediated by ABCA1 transporters.""
